title: Htpasswd Generator
description: Generate Apache / Nginx Basic Auth credentials locally with bcrypt, apr1 (Apache MD5), or SHA.

notice.title: Runs entirely in your browser
notice.body: All hashing happens locally in your browser. Usernames and passwords are never uploaded to any server.

algo.bcryptHint: Recommended and most secure. Outputs the $2y$ prefix for Apache compatibility.
algo.apr1Hint: Apache-specific MD5 scheme with broad compatibility.
algo.shaHint: {SHA}base64(sha1) — widely compatible but weak; avoid for new deployments.

result.heading: Result
result.empty: Fill in a username and password, then click generate.

list.heading: .htpasswd file
list.empty: No entries yet. After generating, click "Add to list" to collect multiple users.

error.usernameWhitespace: Username cannot contain spaces or whitespace.
